section_title: Exemption of certain Combines from payment of Fees.-- No fees shall be charged in respect of the registration in
content:
361. Exemption of certain Combines from payment of Fees.-- No fees shall be charged in respect of the registration in
pursuance of this part of a company if it is not registered as a limited company, or if before its registration as a limited
company the liability of the shareholders was limited by some Act of Parliament.
